synopsis: Super Star Wars is the first of a series of three Super Nintendo games based on the original three films of the Star Wars series, released November 30, 1992. The plot is based on . In 2009 the game was released on the Wii's Virtual Console and on November 17, 2015, it was ported to PlayStation 4 and Vita. The term Super Star Wars can refer to the first game or the entire series.
title: Super Star Wars
